home.startTitle: Choose a surah, set your range, then practise.
home.controlsHint: You can tweak audio, focus tools, and saved sessions any time.
home.guestTitle: Memorise with a quieter, more deliberate session flow.
home.guestSubtitle: Build each session around a small ayah range, steady repetition, and clear recall.
home.guestSupport: Mutqin keeps the Quran central while playback, progress, and saved sessions stay quietly organised around it.
home.guestNote: Login keeps your sessions, insights, and exact memorisation position in sync.

sessionSetup.title: Session Setup
sessionSetup.subtitle: Choose what you memorise
sessionSetup.surahHint: Pick the surah you want to work on.
sessionSetup.noAudioPlayed: No ayah audio played yet for this session.
sessionSetup.rangeHint: Keep ranges small for focused memorisation.
sessionSetup.reciterHint: Changes the audio voice for the session.
sessionSetup.repeatHint: Repeat each verse {count} time(s) before moving on.
sessionSetup.tajweedDesc: Recitation color rules (Idgham, Ikhfa, Madd, etc.)
sessionSetup.fontSizeDesc: Adjust the Arabic text size for better readability
